name: Configure a VLAN Trunk Between a GL.iNet Flint 3 and a Managed Switch
description: Create a tagged VLAN trunk from a Flint 3 router to any managed switch.

step.name: Open LuCI
step.text: Open the Flint 3 LuCI interface at /cgi-bin/luci.

step.name: Enable VLAN filtering
step.text: Enable bridge VLAN filtering on br-lan.

step.name: Tag VLANs on trunk
step.text: Tag the CPU/self port and the selected Flint 3 trunk port for each VLAN.

step.name: Create VLAN interfaces
step.text: Create interfaces such as br-lan.10, br-lan.20, br-lan.30, and br-lan.40 for routed VLANs.

step.name: Configure switch uplink
step.text: Configure the managed switch port connected to the Flint 3 as a tagged trunk with the same VLAN IDs.

step.name: Test clients
step.text: Connect test clients to access ports and confirm DHCP, internet access, and isolation.
